exploration_notes: The log retention policy in Kafka is enforced across these files: (1) TopicConfig.java defines the RETENTION_MS_CONFIG and RETENTION_BYTES_CONFIG constants. (2) ServerLogConfigs.java defines the broker-level LOG_RETENTION_TIME_MILLIS_CONFIG and LOG_RETENTION_BYTES_CONFIG with defaults and documentation. (3) ServerTopicConfigSynonyms.java maps topic-level retention configs to their broker-level log.* prefixed synonyms. (4) LogConfig.java holds the parsed retentionMs/retentionSize fields and conta
